[Pick-Up Recruitment Preview]

A new Pick-Up Recruitment will begin on 1/25 (Tue)!
Target Pick-Up Student: 3★ Azusa, 2★ Hanako

🗓️Pick-Up Recruitment Period: 1/25 (Tue) After Maintenance – 2/8 (Tue) 03:00 (UTC) Before Maintenance
